label: Visual, mobile, usability, and staging
description: Browser-heavy checks for UI confidence and staging validation.

results.name: mobile visual matrix
results.command: PLAYWRIGHT_FORCE_CHROMIUM=1 pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/*.visual.spec.ts tests/e2e/*.visual.test.ts tests/e2e/visual-regression.spec.ts --project=mobile-light --project=mobile-dark --output=test-results/tier-3/mobile-visual

results.name: desktop visual matrix
results.command: pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/*.visual.spec.ts tests/e2e/*.visual.test.ts tests/e2e/visual-regression.spec.ts --project=desktop-light --project=desktop-dark --output=test-results/tier-3/desktop-visual

results.name: mobile flows
results.command: PLAYWRIGHT_FORCE_CHROMIUM=1 pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/mobile.spec.ts --project=mobile-light --output=test-results/tier-3/mobile-flows
